title: Simurgh Device Scanner Result
description: Aggregate, metadata-only scanner summary produced by the platform scanner adapter (macOS CoreGraphics or Windows Win32). All supported platforms emit the same top-level key set; platforms emit 0 for counters that do not apply to them (e.g. macOS emits monitor_only_window_count = 0; Windows never emits the historical unsupported_macos_version state). The signed daemon proof embeds these fields under the same names.

platform.$comment: Operating-system platform that produced the scan. Linux is rejected by Stage 2.7 server validation.

scanner_state.$comment: Scanner state vocabulary; copied from daemonProof.js SCANNER_STATES. 'unsupported_macos_version' is historical and only emitted by macOS.

scanner_version.$comment: Platform-specific scanner version. macOS baseline 2.5.0; Windows baseline 2.6.0.

scan_duration_ms.$comment: Wall-clock duration of the scan, in milliseconds; bounded at 60000.

visible_window_count.$comment: Total visible-window count observed by the scanner; bounded at 10000.

suspicious_window_count.$comment: Aggregate count of windows the scanner flagged as suspicious. Must be >= capture_excluded + monitor_only.

capture_excluded_window_count.$comment: Aggregate count of capture-excluded windows (NSWindow.SharingType.none on macOS, WDA_EXCLUDEFROMCAPTURE on Windows). > 0 escalates to Critical/manual review.

capture_restricted_window_count.$comment: Aggregate count of capture-restricted-but-not-excluded windows. Windows-leaning counter; macOS may emit 0.

monitor_only_window_count.$comment: Aggregate count of WDA_MONITOR windows (Windows). macOS always emits 0.

privacy_mode.$comment: Constant privacy-contract marker. Anything other than 'metadata_only' is rejected by the server.

window_fingerprint_hashes.$comment: Optional array of sha256: window-fingerprint hashes (max 256). Never contains raw titles, HWNDs, PIDs, or process names.
